title: Portfolio Performance Report
description: 30-day rolling P&L report with per-token open/high/low/close — build fund-grade performance dashboards for any wallet on foundational chains.
useCase: Build a hedge fund-style monthly performance report showing each token's 30-day price range, unrealized gain/loss, and portfolio allocation shift.

keyParams.chainName: Foundational chain only — eth-mainnet, base-mainnet, bsc-mainnet, matic-mainnet, optimism-mainnet, gnosis-mainnet
keyParams.walletAddress: 0x wallet address for the performance report
